name: CashFlow
description: A centralized financial tracking and wallet management solution built to monitor and restrict employee expenditures, balance limits, and generate transaction reports.
features: Consolidated wallet balance aggregation and limit monitoring.
Role-based permission access control for employees and admins.
Interactive charts showcasing expenditures, categories, and timelines.
Fast PDF report exports for monthly or weekly business statements.
my_role: Lead Architect & Developer - Developed a centralized wallet management system that aggregates transactions from multiple digital wallets and provides permission-based access control, reporting, and limit monitoring for business operations.
